name: epann-base-api
description: Fullstack Epann Base API - TypeScript + Auto Config

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run generate-config && tsc && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/public && cp -r public/* dist/public/ 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p dist/src && cp src/config.json dist/src/config.json 2>/dev/null; true
